sections.heading: Acme Shop About
sections.content:
ACME Shop is an online shopping platform founded in 2015 and headquartered in Taipei, focused on home & living goods and consumer electronics accessories. Beyond e-commerce, it operates three physical stores—Taipei Xinyi, Taichung Xitun, and Kaohsiung Dream Mall—each offering store-pickup. Its catalog blends distributed brands with the private label acme-basics, which comprises roughly 30% and emphasizes high value-for-money essentials. These products carry a longer warranty; see product-warranty.

[Source: acme_shop_about.md]

open_questions: What are the exact duration and terms of the longer warranty for ACME Basics products?
Are there any additional product categories beyond home & living and consumer electronics accessories?
What are the detailed procedures or requirements for in-store pickup?

sections.heading: 關於Acme商店
sections.content:
ACME 商店創立於 2015 年，總部位於台北，是主打居家生活用品與 3C 配件的線上購物平台。其目前共有 3 家實體門市（台北信義店、台中西屯店、高雄夢時代店），並皆提供門市自取服務，詳見門市自取。全站商品組成以自有品牌「ACME Basics」約佔三成，主打高性價比的生活基本款，其餘七成為代理品牌。ACME Basics 商品享有較長的保固期，具體內容請參考商品保固。

[Source: 關於ACME商店.md]

open_questions: 門市自取的具體流程、可取貨時段與適用限制為何？
ACME Basics 的較長保固期實際長度為何、適用範圍與條件為何？

sections.heading: Account Deletion
sections.content:
Deletion requests submitted in account-settings enter a 14-day grace-period. After the grace period, the account is permanently deleted and cannot be recovered; logging in during the grace period cancels the request.

[Source: account_management_security.md#account-deletion]

open_questions: Are any notifications sent during the 14-day grace period?
Can users request an extension or immediate deletion before the grace period ends?
What happens to associated data (e.g., content, subscriptions) during the grace period and after deletion?

sections.heading: Account Management & Security
sections.content:
Account Management & Security is the central reference for the full account lifecycle. It covers account-setup, maintaining passwords-and-credentials, configuring security-controls, and account-deletion when it is no longer needed.

[Source: account_management_security.md#account-management-security]

sections.heading: Cancelling an Order
sections.content:
While an order is in the processing-status (not yet dispatched), you can cancel it yourself under my-orders. After dispatch, cancellation isn’t possible—use the returns process instead; see refunds-and-returns.

[Source: order_management.md#cancelling-an-order]

sections.heading: Cancelling
sections.content:
Cancellation must be completed at least 24 hours before the next billing-cycle. If a cycle is already scheduled for dispatch, it will still ship as planned; contact support to request a prorated-refund if needed.

[Source: subscription_orders.md#cancelling]

open_questions: Which timezone applies to the 24-hour cutoff?
What exact point counts as “scheduled for dispatch”?
How is the prorated refund calculated and what charges (e.g., shipping) are included?
What channels or steps are required to complete cancellation?

sections.heading: Cash on Delivery
sections.content:
Convenience store pickup can be combined with cash-on-delivery, but only on the main-island. For the cash on delivery amount limit and handling fee, see payment-methods.

[Source: convenience_store_pickup.md#cash-on-delivery]

open_questions: What is the exact cash on delivery amount limit?
What is the handling fee for cash on delivery with convenience store pickup?
How is “main island” defined and which areas are excluded?

sections.heading: Channels
sections.content:
You can contact Support through three channels: live chat via the website’s bottom-right widget, email at support@acme-shop.example, or phone at 02-1234-5678. All options reach the support team directly; choose whichever you prefer.

[Source: contact_support.md#channels]

open_questions: What are the support hours and expected response times for each channel?
Is the phone number accessible internationally or limited to a specific region?
Is live chat available on all devices/pages and does it require login?
Are there recommended use cases for choosing one channel over another?

sections.heading: Conditions
sections.content:
To qualify for a refund or return, the item must be unused, in its original, complete packaging, and accompanied by the original proof of purchase (e-invoice or order number). Items that are defective or damaged in transit are exempt from these conditions; see damaged-items for details.

[Source: refunds_returns.md#conditions]

open_questions: Is there a time limit for initiating a return or refund?
What exactly constitutes “complete packaging” (e.g., all accessories, manuals, and tags)?

sections.heading: Contact Support
sections.content:
Overview of how to reach acme-shop support, listing the available support channels, their service hours, and expected response times. Use this as a quick reference to choose the best contact method and to know when to expect a reply.

[Source: contact_support.md#contact-support]

sections.heading: Convenience Store Payment Codes
sections.content:
Convenience store payment codes have a per-order limit of NT$20,000. Payment must be completed within 3 days of placing the order; unpaid orders are automatically cancelled after the deadline.

[Source: payment_methods.md#convenience-store-payment-codes]

open_questions: Does “3 days” refer to calendar days or business days?

sections.heading: Convenience Store Pickup
sections.content:
This document outlines convenience-store-pickup-fees, pickup-deadlines, and item-restrictions related to convenience store pickup. It defines the scope of charges, collection timeframes, and which items are eligible or prohibited for this pickup method.

[Source: convenience_store_pickup.md#convenience-store-pickup]

open_questions: What are the specific fees for convenience store pickup?
What are the exact pickup deadlines or timeframes?
Which items are restricted or allowed for convenience store pickup?

sections.heading: Credit Card Installments
sections.content:
Credit Card Installments let eligible orders of NT$3,000 or more be split into 3, 6, or 12 payments as a payment-methods option. 3- and 6-installment plans are interest-free, while the 12-installment plan carries 5% annual interest.

[Source: payment_methods.md#credit-card-installments]

open_questions: Are there any issuer or card network restrictions for using installments?
How exactly is the 5% annual interest calculated for the 12-installment plan (e.g., APR on a declining balance vs. flat interest)?
Are there any additional fees or charges beyond the stated interest?

sections.heading: Credit Cards
sections.content:
VISA, MasterCard, and JCB credit cards are accepted. Payments can be made as a single charge or, for qualifying orders, in installments; see credit-card-installments for details.

[Source: payment_methods.md#credit-cards]

open_questions: What criteria determine which orders qualify for installments?
What installment terms (tenure, interest, fees) are available?
Are any other card networks accepted beyond VISA, MasterCard, and JCB?

sections.heading: Damaged Items
sections.content:
This page outlines how to report and resolve damaged or defective deliveries. It serves as a reference for initiating a report and completing the resolution process when items arrive damaged or defective.

[Source: damaged_items.md#damaged-items]

open_questions: What channels are used to submit a damage/defect report (e.g., app, email, support portal)?
Are there deadlines or time limits for reporting damaged or defective deliveries?
What documentation or evidence (photos, packaging, order details) is required?
What resolution options are available (replacement, refund, repair), and how are they chosen?
Who is responsible for return shipping or disposal of damaged items?

sections.heading: Delivery Times
sections.content:
Delivery times for international shipping vary by region after dispatch. Asia deliveries take 5–10 business days, while North America (US, Canada) takes 10–15 business days after dispatch.

[Source: international_shipping.md#delivery-times]

open_questions: Are these timeframes estimates or guaranteed delivery windows?
Do “business days” exclude weekends and regional public holidays?
Are delivery times for regions beyond Asia and North America available?

sections.heading: Denominations & Delivery
sections.content:
Gift cards are digital only, offered in NT$500, NT$1,000, and NT$3,000 denominations. After payment, they are delivered by email to the recipient.

[Source: gift_cards.md#denominations-delivery]

open_questions: Is email delivery instantaneous upon payment or subject to processing time?
Are custom amounts or other denominations available beyond NT$500, NT$1,000, and NT$3,000?

sections.heading: Destinations
sections.content:
Under international-shipping destinations, acme-shop currently ships to Japan, South Korea, Hong Kong, Macau, Singapore, Malaysia, the United States, and Canada. This list reflects the active international destinations supported at present.

[Source: international_shipping.md#destinations]

sections.heading: Difference from Regular Returns
sections.content:
Damaged or defective items are exempt from the usual “unused, complete packaging” return-conditions that apply to regular returns. In these cases, ACME Shop covers the return shipping. For process and policy details, see refunds-and-returns.

[Source: damaged_items.md#difference-from-regular-returns]

open_questions: Is there a specific time window for reporting damaged/defective items?
What proof (photos, packaging, etc.) is required to qualify as damaged/defective?
How is the return shipping arranged (e.g., prepaid label, pickup)?

sections.heading: Dispatch Time
sections.content:
Orders are dispatched within 24–48 hours after payment-confirmation. During major-sale-events, dispatch may be delayed by 1–2 days.

[Source: shipping_delivery.md#dispatch-time]

open_questions: Is the 24–48 hours window counted in calendar or business days, and which time zone applies?
What qualifies as “major sale events” and how will customers be notified?
Is the 1–2 day delay added on top of the 24–48 hours, and are weekends/holidays excluded?

sections.heading: Duties & Taxes
sections.content:
International orders ship ddu, meaning destination duties and import taxes are the recipient’s responsibility. These charges are collected by the local carrier at customs during import clearance.

[Source: international_shipping.md#duties-taxes]

sections.heading: Earning Points
sections.content:
Earn 1 point per NT$100 spent, calculated on the amount actually paid; shipping fees and any portion covered by point-redemption do not earn points. Points post to your account within 24 hours after order-completion, which occurs after the inspection-period.

[Source: membership_points.md#earning-points]

open_questions: How are partial amounts under NT$100 handled for point accrual (rounding rules)?
What is the duration and criteria of the inspection period before order completion?

sections.heading: Eligible Items & Cycles
sections.content:
Subscriptions are available for consumable-products such as filters and cleaning supplies. Delivery cycles are limited to 30, 60, or 90 days for these subscriptions and their delivery-cycles.

[Source: subscription_orders.md#eligible-items-cycles]

open_questions: Are any non-consumable products eligible for subscriptions?
Can customers select custom cycle lengths beyond 30, 60, or 90 days?

sections.heading: Excluded Items
sections.content:
Liquids and battery-powered-products cannot be shipped internationally under our international-shipping policy. At checkout, the international shipping option is automatically removed if the cart contains any liquid or battery-powered product.

[Source: international_shipping.md#excluded-items]

open_questions: What precisely qualifies as a “liquid” (e.g., gels, aerosols)?
Which battery types or products are covered, and are any exempt?
Are there destination- or carrier-specific exceptions or approved methods?

sections.heading: Exclusions
sections.content:
Promo codes do not apply to certain purchases. Exclusions include purchases of gift-cards and items already on sale.

[Source: promo_codes.md#exclusions]

open_questions: Does “items already on sale” include clearance, bundles, or limited-time promotions?
Are all types of gift cards (physical, e-gift, third-party) excluded?

sections.heading: Expiry
sections.content:
Points in the membership-reward-points program are valid for 12 months from the credit-date and then expire automatically. You can check your points balance and individual expiry dates under my-points.

[Source: membership_points.md#expiry]

open_questions: What exactly constitutes the "credit date" (e.g., transaction date vs. posting date)?
Can expired points be reinstated or extended, and are any reminders sent before expiry?

sections.heading: Express Home Delivery
sections.content:
Express home delivery to main-island-addresses arrives 1–2 business days after dispatch and costs NT$150. Orders must be placed and paid before 14:00 the same day. oversized-or-fragile-items are not eligible; the checkout page automatically indicates express availability per item.

[Source: shipping_delivery.md#express-home-delivery]

open_questions: What precisely qualifies as “main-island addresses” (e.g., are outlying islands excluded)?
Do “business days” exclude weekends and public holidays?
If an order is placed after 14:00, is it dispatched the next business day?
Is the NT$150 fee charged per order or per package when items ship separately?

sections.heading: Fee
sections.content:
Convenience store pickup costs NT$60. Orders of NT$1,000 or more ship free, matching the home-delivery threshold.

[Source: convenience_store_pickup.md#fee]

open_questions: Does the NT$1,000 threshold apply before or after discounts, coupons, or taxes?
Are there any exceptions or surcharges (e.g., oversized items, remote areas) for convenience store pickup?

sections.heading: Fees
sections.content:
Fees for international-shipping start at NT$400 for Asia and NT$800 for North America. The exact amount is calculated at checkout based on parcel weight, and free-shipping-offers do not apply to international orders.

[Source: international_shipping.md#fees]

open_questions: Are shipping fees available for regions outside Asia and North America?
How is parcel weight measured or rounded for fee calculation?
Do fees include duties, taxes, or other surcharges?

sections.heading: Filing a Claim
sections.content:
To file a warranty claim, complete the claim form on the warranty-service page and attach either your e‑invoice or your order number. Repairs take 7–14 business days, after which the item is shipped back.

[Source: warranty.md#filing-a-claim]

open_questions: Does the 7–14 business day window exclude transit time for return shipping?
What if neither an e‑invoice nor an order number is available as proof of purchase?
Are shipping costs for sending the item in and for return shipping covered by the warranty?

sections.heading: Flash sale shopping notes
sections.content:
Flash sale items follow the same rules as regular orders: only one promo code per order, promo codes don’t apply to items already on sale, and standard delivery is free for orders of NT$1,000 or more. Because flash sales are treated as major-campaign-periods, dispatch may be 1–2 days later than usual.

[Source: flash_sale_faq.md#flash-sale-shopping-notes]

open_questions: If an order mixes flash sale and non-sale items, can a promo code apply to the non-sale items?

sections.heading: Gift Card Restrictions
sections.content:
Gift cards are non-refundable, cannot be exchanged for cash, and do not provide cash change. Any unused balance remains in your account for future purchases. Promo codes cannot be applied to gift card purchases (see promo-codes).

[Source: gift_cards.md#gift-card-restrictions]

open_questions: Does the unused balance ever expire or incur fees?
Are promo codes allowed on orders paid with gift cards (as tender), as opposed to on purchasing gift cards themselves?

sections.heading: Gift Cards and Reward Points
sections.content:
Orders that buy gift-cards do not earn reward-points. Orders paid with a gift card earn points normally.

[Source: gift_cards.md#gift-cards-and-reward-points]

open_questions: If an order includes both a gift card purchase and other merchandise, do the non–gift card items earn points?
For mixed-tender payments (part gift card, part another method), are points awarded on the full order or only the non–gift card portion?

sections.heading: Gift Cards
sections.content:
This section covers denominations, validity, and usage rules for digital-gift-cards. It outlines the available amounts, how long cards remain valid, and how they can be used.

[Source: gift_cards.md#gift-cards]

open_questions: Which specific denominations are offered?
What is the exact validity period or expiration policy?
What usage rules or restrictions apply?

sections.heading: Hold Period
sections.content:
store-pickup orders are held for 3 calendar days from the ready-for-pickup-notification. Unclaimed orders are cancelled automatically with a full refund to the original payment method within 5–7 business days. This does not apply to convenience-store-parcels, which follow their own 7‑day rule.

[Source: store_pickup.md#hold-period]

sections.heading: How to Use
sections.content:
Enter the code in the Promo code field at checkout and apply it. Codes cannot be added after checkout—confirm it’s applied before submitting your order.

[Source: promo_codes.md#how-to-use]

sections.heading: International Shipping
sections.content:
This section states that the document covers international shipping scope across international-destinations, delivery-times, shipping-fees, and shipping-restrictions. It provides an overview of where shipping is available, expected timelines, associated costs, and applicable limitations.

[Source: international_shipping.md#international-shipping]

open_questions: Which specific international destinations are supported?
What are the delivery time ranges by destination or service level?
How are fees calculated and in which currencies are they charged?
What specific restrictions apply (e.g., item types, size/weight limits, destination-based bans)?
Are any destinations excluded due to legal or logistical constraints?

sections.heading: Item Restrictions
sections.content:
Items weighing over 5 kg or with any side longer than 45 cm (oversized) are not eligible for convenience-store-pickup. For such items, the convenience store pickup option is automatically hidden at checkout.

[Source: convenience_store_pickup.md#item-restrictions]

sections.heading: Items Not Eligible for Refund
sections.content:
This section under Refunds & Returns specifies items not eligible for refund or return. Ineligible items include downloaded-digital-content (e-books, software keys), customized-products (engraving, printing), and opened food or hygiene products. No exceptions or additional conditions are stated.

[Source: refunds_returns.md#items-not-eligible-for-refund]

open_questions: Are unopened food or hygiene products eligible?
Are defective or damaged customized products eligible?
Does "downloaded digital content" exclude unredeemed software keys or undownloaded purchases?

sections.heading: Locations
sections.content:
In-store pickup is available at all three retail locations — taipei-xinyi, taichung-xitun, and kaohsiung-dream-mall. Pickup at these stores is offered free of charge.

[Source: store_pickup.md#locations]

open_questions: Are there specific pickup hours or ID/order number requirements at each store?
Is there a holding period or notification process before pickup?

sections.heading: Login Protection
sections.content:
After 5 consecutive failed login attempts, the account is locked for 30 minutes under the account-lockout-policy. You can unlock early by completing a password-reset through the “Forgot password” option.

[Source: account_management_security.md#login-protection]

open_questions: Does the failed-attempt counter reset after a successful login or after a period of time?
Is the lockout enforced strictly per account, or also influenced by device/IP/address?
During the lockout, are any alternative recovery methods (e.g., 2FA-based unlock) available besides password reset?

sections.heading: Member Day perks
sections.content:
On member-day, point-redemption follows the standard everyday rules. Each point is worth NT$1, and you can apply points to cover up to 50% of an order's total.

[Source: member_day.md#member-day-perks]

open_questions: Does “order’s total” include shipping, taxes, or fees when calculating the 50% cap?
Are there any item or category exclusions for using points on Member Day?

sections.heading: Member Day perks
sections.content:
On the monthly member-day, gold-membership and platinum-membership members receive bonus-point promotions. Point earning rules remain unchanged: every NT$100 spent earns 1 point, calculated on the actual amount paid.

[Source: member_day.md#member-day-perks]

open_questions: What are the specific bonus-point rates or multipliers offered on Member Day?
Are there caps, exclusions, or category/channel limitations on the bonus points?
Do the bonus points stack with other promotions or coupons?
Are members outside Gold and Platinum tiers eligible for any Member Day perks?

sections.heading: Membership & Reward Points
sections.content:
This section outlines the program’s reward-points covering points-earning, points-redemption, and points-expiry. It also summarizes the structure and scope of membership-tiers.

[Source: membership_points.md#membership-reward-points]

open_questions: What are the specific earning rates for points?
Which redemption options are available and at what conversion values?
What is the exact points expiry period and are there any extension or rollover rules?
What are the tier qualification thresholds, benefits, and review/qualification periods?

sections.heading: Membership Tiers
sections.content:
There are three membership tiers: Member, gold-tier, and platinum-tier. Member is free on registration and earns points at the standard rate. Gold requires NT$30,000 spent in the last 12 months and grants free shipping with no minimum plus double points during your birthday month. Platinum requires NT$100,000 spent in the last 12 months, includes all Gold benefits, and adds a free upgrade to express-delivery and a dedicated support line.

[Source: membership_points.md#membership-tiers]

open_questions: Is “last 12 months” evaluated on a rolling basis, and how are upgrades or downgrades handled?
What is the exact standard point earning rate for Member?
Does free shipping with no minimum apply to all regions and shipping methods?
What are the service levels, limits, or exclusions for the free upgrade to express delivery and the dedicated support line?

sections.heading: Mobile Payments
sections.content:
Mobile payments are supported via apple-pay and google-pay. No other mobile wallet options are specified.

[Source: payment_methods.md#mobile-payments]

open_questions: Are any other mobile wallets supported beyond Apple Pay and Google Pay?
Are there regional, device, or browser limitations for using these wallets?
Is support limited to online checkout, or also available for in-app or in-person payments?
Are there any fees or setup requirements for enabling these mobile payment options?

sections.heading: Modifying an Order
sections.content:
Order modifications are limited. The shipping address can be edited under my-orders any time before dispatch. The payment method can be changed via self-service within 1 hour of placing the order; after that, the only option is order-cancellation and placing a new order, and items themselves cannot be modified.

[Source: order_management.md#modifying-an-order]

open_questions: What options, if any, exist for changing the shipping address after dispatch?
Which time reference governs the 1-hour window for payment method changes (time zone/order timestamp)?
Are any support-assisted exceptions allowed for payment method changes after the 1-hour window?

sections.heading: Not Accepted
sections.content:
We do not accept bank transfers, checks, or foreign-currency payments. All orders must be paid using one of the supported options listed under payment-methods.

[Source: payment_methods.md#not-accepted]

open_questions: Which specific payment methods are supported (as referenced above)?

sections.heading: Order History & Invoices
sections.content:
Order History & Invoices in order-management lets you access past orders, which are retained for 5 years. Under my-orders, you can look up previous purchases and download e-invoices.

[Source: order_management.md#order-history-invoices]

open_questions: Is the 5-year retention period rolling from each order date, and what happens to records after that window?
Are e-invoices available for all orders, and in which formats are they provided?

sections.heading: Order Management
sections.content:
This document covers core Order Management activities: cancelling, modifying, and looking up orders. It organizes content around cancelling-orders, modifying-orders, and order-lookup.

[Source: order_management.md#order-management]

open_questions: What policies or constraints govern when an order can be cancelled or modified?
Are partial cancellations or modifications supported?
Who is authorized to perform these actions (roles/permissions)?
What order statuses are affected or required for each action?

sections.heading: Password Rules
sections.content:
Passwords must be at least 10 characters long and include uppercase letters, lowercase letters, and digits. These rules set the minimum complexity requirements for account passwords under account-management-security.

[Source: account_management_security.md#password-rules]

open_questions: Are special characters required or restricted?
Are spaces or passphrases allowed?

sections.heading: Pausing
sections.content:
In subscription-orders, a subscription can be paused for up to 3 months. To avoid being charged for the next cycle, the pause must be set at least 24 hours before the next billing-cycle; otherwise that upcoming cycle will still be charged.

[Source: subscription_orders.md#pausing]

open_questions: Is the 3-month limit per pause or a cumulative cap across multiple pauses?
What happens to shipments or services during the paused period?
How is the 24-hour cutoff determined with respect to time zones?

sections.heading: Payment Methods
sections.content:
This page outlines the payment methods accepted by acme-shop and the limits associated with each. It specifies which options can be used at checkout and the corresponding usage caps per method.

[Source: payment_methods.md#payment-methods]

open_questions: Which specific payment methods are accepted?
What are the exact limits per method?
Do limits vary by region, currency, or customer account status?
Are there exceptions or temporary overrides for limits?
How are updates to accepted methods and limits communicated?

sections.heading: Pickup Flow & Deadline
sections.content:
When your parcel reaches the selected store, you’ll receive an SMS notification. For convenience-store-pickup, parcels are held for 7 days after arrival (by contrast, in-store-pickup has a 3‑day hold from the ready notification). Unclaimed parcels are returned, the order is cancelled automatically, and the payment is refunded to the original method.

[Source: convenience_store_pickup.md#pickup-flow-deadline]

sections.heading: Process
sections.content:
To request a refund, log in, go to my-orders, select the order, click request-refund, and provide a reason. customer-support reviews the request within 3 business days, and if approved, the refund is sent to your original payment-methods within 5–7 business days.

[Source: refunds_returns.md#process]

open_questions: Is a physical return required for some items, and what is the return shipping process?
How are customers notified of approval or denial?
Do “business days” exclude weekends and public holidays?
Are there eligibility windows or conditions not described here?

sections.heading: Product Warranty
sections.content:
The Product Warranty document outlines the scope of coverage across warranty-periods, warranty-claims, and warranty-exclusions. It indicates the duration of coverage, the process for making a claim, and the limitations where coverage does not apply.

[Source: warranty.md#product-warranty]

open_questions: What are the exact warranty periods for covered products?
What is the step-by-step process or required documentation for a warranty claim?
Which specific items, conditions, or damages are excluded from coverage?

sections.heading: Promo Code Expiry
sections.content:
Expired promo-codes are invalid and not reissued; once the validity period ends, the code cannot be used. Validity dates are stated on each campaign-page.

[Source: promo_codes.md#promo-code-expiry]

open_questions: Are there any exceptions to the non-reissue policy for expired codes?
Can validity periods be extended or codes reactivated?

sections.heading: Promo Codes
sections.content:
This page explains how promo codes function and the limitations that govern their use. It defines the scope of promo code behavior and the restrictions users should be aware of.

[Source: promo_codes.md#promo-codes]

open_questions: What specific restrictions are covered?
Which scenarios or edge cases are addressed?
Are there any exceptions or overrides to the restrictions?

sections.heading: Reactivating
sections.content:
Reactivating a cancelled subscription uses the current price and reflects current stock availability; the original subscription price is not retained. In other words, reactivation under subscription-orders does not restore legacy pricing.

[Source: subscription_orders.md#reactivating]

sections.heading: Redeeming Points
sections.content:
At checkout, points can be applied at a fixed rate of 1 point = NT$1 off. You may redeem points to cover up to 50% of a single order’s total.

[Source: membership_points.md#redeeming-points]

open_questions: Does “order total” include taxes, shipping, and fees?
Is the 50% cap calculated before or after other discounts or vouchers?
Can fractional points be redeemed, or only whole points?

sections.heading: Referrals
sections.content:
You receive 50 points when a friend registers via your referral-link and completes their first purchase. Points are awarded only after the friend's first purchase is completed within the reward-points program.

[Source: membership_points.md#referrals]

open_questions: Is there a limit to how many times the 50-point referral reward can be earned?
When exactly are the points credited (immediately after purchase, fulfillment, or after any return window)?
What happens if the friend’s first purchase is canceled or refunded?
Does the friend also receive any reward, or only the referrer?
Are self-referrals or existing customers eligible?

sections.heading: Refund Window
sections.content:
The refund window is 14 calendar days from the date the item is received, including holidays. Refund requests must be submitted within this period; requests filed after the 14-day deadline cannot be accepted.

[Source: refunds_returns.md#refund-window]

open_questions: How is the exact 'received' date determined (e.g., carrier delivery confirmation vs. customer signature)?
Which timezone is used to calculate the 14-day deadline, if applicable?

sections.heading: Refunds & Returns
sections.content:
This overview outlines the key elements of our refunds and returns policy, including the refund-application-window, refund-eligibility, the refund-review-process and refund-timelines, as well as return shipping costs and non-refundable-items. Specific durations, criteria, and exceptions are not defined here and are detailed in the sections below.

[Source: refunds_returns.md#refunds-returns]

sections.heading: Registration
sections.content:
Three sign-up methods are supported: email, google, and line. If you register with a third-party account, you can still set a password in account-settings as a backup login method.

[Source: account_management_security.md#registration]

sections.heading: Replacement Timing
sections.content:
Upon approval of a damaged-items claim, replacements are dispatched within 3 business days. This timeframe is measured to dispatch only and does not include delivery time.

[Source: damaged_items.md#replacement-timing]

open_questions: What exactly constitutes "business days" (e.g., weekends and holidays, and which time zone applies)?
How is the approval timestamp determined and communicated to the customer?
Are there any exceptions or expedited handling options to this dispatch window?

sections.heading: Reporting Deadline & Method
sections.content:
Report damaged or defective items within 48 hours via my-orders → report-a-problem. Attach photos of both the item and the outer packaging, ensuring the damage is clearly visible.

[Source: damaged_items.md#reporting-deadline-method]

open_questions: What happens if the report is submitted after 48 hours?
Are alternative reporting channels (e.g., support email or chat) allowed?
Are videos or other file types accepted in addition to photos?
Are there specific requirements for photo resolution or number of images?

sections.heading: Resolution Options
sections.content:
Once a damage report is approved, you may choose one of two resolutions. Either receive a free replacement of the same item with shipping both ways covered by ACME Shop, or get a full refund, including the original shipping fee, back to the original payment method.

[Source: damaged_items.md#resolution-options]

sections.heading: Response Time
sections.content:
Emails are answered within 1 business-day. Live chat responds in real time during service-hours; messages sent outside those hours are queued as offline-messages and handled in the order received during the next service window.

[Source: contact_support.md#response-time]

open_questions: What are the exact service hours and time zone observed?
How is a business day defined (e.g., weekends and holidays)?
Is there any prioritization among queued offline messages beyond order received?

sections.heading: Restrictions
sections.content:
reward-points are neither redeemable for cash nor transferable between accounts. If an order is refunded (see refunds), any points redeemed on it and any points earned from it will both be reclaimed.

[Source: membership_points.md#restrictions]

open_questions: How are partial refunds handled—are points reclaimed proportionally?
When are points reclaimed—upon refund initiation or completion?
Are there any exceptions for family/linked accounts or administrator-approved transfers?

sections.heading: Return deadline reminder
sections.content:
You may request a refund within 30 days of receiving your item, defining the return-window. Refunds follow the standard process: support reviews within 3 business days, and approved refunds reach the original payment method within 5–7 business days (see refund-processing-timeline). Non-defective returns incur an NT$80 deduction from the refund (the non-defective-return-fee).

[Source: returns_reminder.md#return-deadline-reminder]

See also [[return-shipping-guide]].

open_questions: Does the 30-day window count calendar days and start from delivery confirmation?
Is the NT$80 fee applied per item or per return order?
What qualifies as a non-defective return?

sections.heading: Return Shipping
sections.content:
Customers returning non-defective items pay a flat NT$80 return shipping fee, deducted from the refund. For defective products or items damaged in transit, acme-shop covers the return shipping cost. No restocking-fee is charged for any product category.

[Source: refunds_returns.md#return-shipping]

open_questions: Does the NT$80 fee apply per item, per package, or per return order?
How is defect or transit damage determined or verified?
Are there any geographic or carrier limitations to the NT$80 rate or coverage?

sections.heading: Rules
sections.content:
Only one promo code can be used per order. Promo codes can be combined with reward-points: the promo discount is applied first, then points may be used to cover part of the remaining balance.

[Source: promo_codes.md#rules]

open_questions: Are there limits on how much of the remainder reward-points can cover?
Do promo codes and points apply before or after taxes, fees, and shipping?
Can promo codes stack with any other types of discounts beyond reward points?

sections.heading: Service Hours
sections.content:
Service hours for contact-support vary by channel. Phone and email are available Monday–Friday, 09:00–18:00; live-chat follows the same weekday hours and additionally operates on Saturday 10:00–17:00. All support channels are closed on national-holidays.

[Source: contact_support.md#service-hours]

open_questions: What time zone do the listed hours use?
Which country’s national holidays determine closures?

sections.heading: Shipping & Delivery
sections.content:
Summarizes domestic shipping methods, associated fees, and expected delivery times. For cross-border orders, see international-shipping.

[Source: shipping_delivery.md#shipping-delivery]

sections.heading: Standard Home Delivery
sections.content:
Orders to the taiwan-main-island arrive 3–5 business days after dispatch; shipments to the outlying islands—penghu, kinmen, and matsu—require an additional 1–3 business days. Standard shipping costs NT$80, with free shipping on orders of NT$1,000 or more.

[Source: shipping_delivery.md#standard-home-delivery]

sections.heading: Store locations and pickup service
sections.content:
ACME Shop operates three physical stores: taipei-xinyi, taichung-xitun, and kaohsiung-dream-mall. All locations offer free in-store-pickup for online orders; present your order barcode and a valid photo ID when collecting.

[Source: store_services_guide.md#store-locations-and-pickup-service]

open_questions: What are the pickup hours and how long will stores hold an order for pickup?
Can an authorized person other than the purchaser pick up the order, and which forms of photo ID are accepted?

sections.heading: Store Pickup
sections.content:
This section provides an overview of in-store pickup, covering pickup locations, timing, and the requirements customers must meet. It serves as a guide to where orders can be collected, when they will be ready, and what is needed to complete pickup.

[Source: store_pickup.md#store-pickup]

open_questions: Which store locations support pickup?
How long does it take for an order to be ready for pickup?
What documentation or verification is required at pickup?
Are there specific pickup windows or hold times?
Can someone other than the purchaser pick up the order?

sections.heading: Subscription Benefits
sections.content:
Subscription orders receive a 5% discount each cycle off the one-time-price, and they ship free regardless of the usual free-shipping-threshold. These are the standing benefits for active subscription orders.

[Source: subscription_orders.md#subscription-benefits]

open_questions: Is the 5% discount calculated against the current one-time price at the time of each charge or locked at signup?
Does the free shipping benefit apply to all destinations and shipping speeds?
Can the 5% discount be combined with other promotions or discounts?

sections.heading: Subscription Orders
sections.content:
This section summarizes policies for subscription orders, covering which purchases qualify, what discounts apply, and how a subscriber can pause or cancel. It consolidates guidance on subscription-eligibility, subscription-discounts, subscription-pausing, and subscription-cancellation for managing the subscription lifecycle.

[Source: subscription_orders.md#subscription-orders]

open_questions: What specific criteria determine subscription eligibility?
What are the exact discount rates and how are they applied?
Are there limits or conditions on pausing (e.g., duration or frequency)?
What are the precise steps and any fees or notice periods required for cancellation?

sections.heading: Timing
sections.content:
store-pickup orders are usually ready within 2 hours of payment, with preparation occurring only during store-opening-hours. Go to the store only after your order status shows ready-for-pickup; staff cannot pull stock earlier.

[Source: store_pickup.md#timing]

open_questions: If an order is placed near closing, is the 2-hour prep time carried over to the next opening period?
Besides the status change, is there any additional notification when an order becomes ready?

sections.heading: Tracking
sections.content:
After dispatch, you’ll receive an email with your tracking number. Track your shipment via my-orders → track-shipment; tracking data updates within 24 hours of dispatch.

[Source: shipping_delivery.md#tracking]

open_questions: What should you do if the tracking email is not received?
Is there any in-account notification besides email when tracking becomes available?

sections.heading: Two-Step Verification
sections.content:
Enable two-step verification under account-settings → Security. Two methods are supported: sms-one-time-codes and authenticator-apps (totp). Once enabled, every login from a new device requires the second factor.

[Source: account_management_security.md#two-step-verification]

open_questions: Are backup or recovery codes available if the second factor is lost?
Can multiple second-factor methods be enrolled simultaneously?
How is a “new device” defined and how long is device trust retained?

sections.heading: Validity
sections.content:
Gift cards do not expire; they remain valid indefinitely. This policy aligns with Taiwan's gift voucher regulations taiwan-gift-voucher-regulations.

[Source: gift_cards.md#validity]

open_questions: Are any dormancy or maintenance fees applicable despite having no expiry date?
Do replacement or reissued cards retain the same perpetual validity?

sections.heading: Warranty Exclusions
sections.content:
Warranty exclusions cover damage resulting from misuse (drops, water exposure, or unauthorized disassembly) and any items beyond their warranty-period. Out-of-warranty items can receive paid-repair: support provides a quote, and repair starts only after you confirm it.

[Source: warranty.md#warranty-exclusions]

open_questions: Are there other warranty exclusions beyond misuse and expired warranty period?
What costs are included in the paid repair quote (e.g., parts, labor, shipping), and how long is it valid?
What is the expected turnaround time and how is confirmation captured?

sections.heading: Warranty Periods
sections.content:
Warranty periods vary by product line. Electronics accessories and appliances have a 12‑month manufacturer warranty from the invoice-date, while acme-basics private label products have a 24‑month warranty from the invoice-date.

[Source: warranty.md#warranty-periods]

sections.heading: What to Bring
sections.content:
For store-pickup, bring your order-barcode and a photo-id to collect your order. Someone else may pick up on your behalf if they present the order barcode and their own photo ID.

[Source: store_pickup.md#what-to-bring]

open_questions: Which forms of photo ID are accepted?
Are digital barcodes or digital IDs acceptable?
Are there any additional requirements for third-party pickup?

sections.id: 不保固範圍#不保固範圍
sections.heading: 不保固範圍
sections.content:
本節說明商品保固的不保固範圍：包含人為損壞（如摔落、進水、私自拆修等），以及超過保固期限的商品。對於不在保固範圍內者，顧客可申請付費維修；客服將提供報價，並於顧客確認後才進行維修。

[Source: 商品保固.md#不保固範圍]

open_questions: 人為損壞的判定標準與檢測方式為何？
付費維修的申請流程與處理時程為何？
報價是否包含運費或檢測費用？
付費維修完成後是否提供維修保固？

sections.id: 不支援的付款方式#不支援的付款方式
sections.heading: 不支援的付款方式
sections.content:
本節說明不支援的付款方式：不接受銀行轉帳、支票與外幣付款。請改用上述支援的付款方式完成訂單。

[Source: 付款方式.md#不支援的付款方式]

open_questions: 「上述支援的付款方式」具體包含哪些？
sources: 付款方式.md#不支援的付款方式

sections.id: 不適用範圍#不適用範圍
sections.heading: 不適用範圍
sections.content:
本節說明促銷代碼的不適用範圍：不可用於禮物卡商品，亦不可用於已在特價中的商品（特價商品）。上述品項不得使用促銷代碼折抵。

[Source: 促銷代碼.md#不適用範圍]

open_questions: 是否還有其他不適用品項（如運費、稅費或特定品牌）未列出？
「特價中」的判定依據為何（例如限時折扣、清倉、套裝價是否包含）？

sections.id: 不適用退款的情況#不適用退款的情況
sections.heading: 不適用退款的情況
sections.content:
本節列出不適用退款與退貨的品項，作為[[退款與退貨]]政策的排除範圍。包括已下載的[[數位內容]]（如電子書、軟體序號）、[[客製化商品]]（如刻字、印花），以及已開封的食品或衛生用品；上述品項不提供退款，亦不受理退貨申請。

[Source: 退款與退貨.md#不適用退款的情況]

open_questions: 未下載或未啟用的數位內容是否可申請退款？
客製化商品若有瑕疵或與訂單不符時是否例外受理退貨？
未開封的食品或衛生用品是否適用一般退貨規則？
sources: 退款與退貨.md#不適用退款的情況

sections.heading: 付款方式
sections.content:
本頁說明 ACME 商店 支援的付款方式與相關限制。內容聚焦於可用的付款選項與其適用條件，指出哪些方式可用，以及在何種情況下可能受限或不適用。

[Source: 付款方式.md#付款方式]

open_questions: 具體支援哪些付款方式？
各付款方式對應的限制與適用條件為何？
是否存在例外或特殊情況？

sections.heading: 使用效期
sections.content:
依台灣禮券相關規範，禮物卡無使用期限，亦不會因時間經過而失效。使用者可於任何時點持卡消費，無須擔心到期。

[Source: 禮物卡.md#使用效期]

open_questions: 此規範是否僅適用於在台灣發行與使用的禮物卡？

sections.heading: 使用方式
sections.content:
在結帳頁面的「促銷代碼」欄位輸入代碼並點選套用，方能生效。訂單一旦送出後，促銷代碼不可追加或事後補用；請務必於送出前確認已正確套用。

[Source: 促銷代碼.md#使用方式]

open_questions: 是否可在結帳送出前更換或移除已套用的代碼？
是否支援一次使用多組促銷代碼（疊加）？
若代碼未成功套用，系統會提供何種錯誤提示或處理方式？

sections.heading: 使用規則
sections.content:
每筆訂單限用一組促銷代碼。促銷代碼可與紅利點數並用，系統會先套用代碼折扣，再以點數折抵剩餘金額。

[Source: 促銷代碼.md#使用規則]

open_questions: 紅利點數是否有使用上限或可全額折抵？
是否可與其他優惠（如禮物卡、滿額免運）並用？
是否有不適用的商品或分類？

sections.heading: 使用限制
sections.content:
禮物卡不可退款、不得兌換現金，亦不提供找零或儲值返還；單筆訂單未用完的餘額將保留於帳戶，供下次消費使用。另購買禮物卡時不可使用促銷代碼（詳見該頁）。

[Source: 禮物卡.md#使用限制]

sections.heading: 促銷代碼
sections.content:
本節為促銷代碼的總述，概括其使用方式、使用規則、不適用範圍與逾期規定。具體條款與操作細節不在此節展開，請參見以下各節。

[Source: 促銷代碼.md#促銷代碼]

sections.heading: 保固期限
sections.content:
本段說明商品保固的起算與年限：皆自發票日算起。3C 配件與電器類享有原廠 12 個月保固；ACME Basics 自有品牌商品提供 24 個月保固。

[Source: 商品保固.md#保固期限]

open_questions: 是否存在特定品項或除外條款的例外保固期限？
非 3C／電器與 ACME Basics 品類的保固期限為何？
補發或更換發票是否影響保固起算日？
維修或更換後保固是否重新起算？

sections.heading: 保固申請
sections.content:
申請商品保固需至官網的保固服務頁面填寫申請單，並附上電子發票或訂單編號作為憑證。維修處理時間為7至14個工作天，完成後將商品寄回。

[Source: 商品保固.md#保固申請]

open_questions: 是否需自行負擔來回運費？
維修時間起算點為寄出日還是到件日？
若無法提供電子發票或訂單編號，是否有其他驗證方式？
是否有地區或海外申請的限制與流程差異？

sections.heading: 保留期限
sections.content:
門市自取商品自「可取貨」通知起於門市保留3天（日曆天）；本規則不含超商取貨，超商包裹到店後保留7天。逾期未取的訂單將自動取消並全額退款，款項依標準退款時程（5至7個工作天）退回原付款方式。

[Source: 門市自取.md#保留期限]

open_questions: 「可取貨」通知的傳遞管道與起算時間點（例如簡訊/Email、通知發出或顧客讀取時）未具體說明。
是否可申請延長保留期限或代領規範未載明。

sections.heading: 信用卡
sections.content:
接受 VISA、MasterCard、JCB 之信用卡付款，可一次付清。符合滿額門檻的訂單亦可選擇分期付款，詳見信用卡分期。

[Source: 付款方式.md#信用卡]

open_questions: 滿額門檻金額為多少？
可分期期數與適用銀行為何？
是否有分期手續費或利率？

sections.id: 信用卡分期#信用卡分期
sections.heading: 信用卡分期
sections.content:
單筆訂單滿新台幣 3,000 元可使用信用卡分期，提供 3、6、12 期選擇。3 期與 6 期為零利率，12 期採年利率 5%。

[Source: 付款方式.md#信用卡分期]

open_questions: 是否限特定銀行或卡別適用？
12 期年利率 5% 的計算方式與是否另收手續費？
退貨或部分退款時分期款如何處理？

sections.heading: 修改訂單
sections.content:
收件地址可在出貨前於我的訂單自行更新；付款方式僅能在下單後1小時內自助變更，逾時需先取消訂單後再重新下單。商品品項無法變更，若需調整請取消後重新下單。

[Source: 訂單管理.md#修改訂單]

open_questions: 「出貨前」的判定標準為何（以哪個訂單狀態或時間點為準）？

sections.id: 兩步驟驗證#兩步驟驗證
sections.heading: 兩步驟驗證
sections.content:
可於「帳號設定 → 安全性」啟用兩步驟驗證，支援兩種方式：簡訊 otp 驗證碼與驗證器 App（totp）。啟用後，每次在新裝置登入時都需輸入第二重驗證碼以完成登入。

[Source: 帳號管理與安全.md#兩步驟驗證]

open_questions: 是否支援多個驗證器或同時啟用兩種方式？
是否提供備用復原碼或緊急聯絡方式？
已信任裝置是否會免驗證、信任期限為何？
無法收取簡訊或丟失驗證器時的復原流程為何？
sources: 帳號管理與安全.md#兩步驟驗證

sections.heading: 出貨時間
sections.content:
本節說明出貨時效：訂單於付款確認後，通常在 24 至 48 小時內出貨。於大型促銷檔期，出貨時程可能順延 1 至 2 天。

[Source: 運送與配送.md#出貨時間]

open_questions: 24 至 48 小時為日曆小時或工作時數？
大型促銷期間順延 1 至 2 天是否以一般時效為基準累加計算？

sections.heading: 到貨時效
sections.content:
本節列出國際配送的到貨時效，時間皆以出貨後的工作天數計算。亞洲地區為 5–10 個工作天；北美地區（美國、加拿大）為 10–15 個工作天。

[Source: 國際配送.md#到貨時效]

open_questions: 是否涵蓋亞洲、北美以外地區的到貨時效？
「工作天」是以寄件地或收件地的工作日計算？

sections.id: 取件流程與期限#取件流程與期限
sections.heading: 取件流程與期限
sections.content:
商品送達指定超商後，系統將以簡訊通知取件，包裹於超商門市保留 7 天（超商取貨專屬規則）。若為門市自取，則自「可取貨」通知起保留 3 天。逾期未取將退回並自動取消訂單，款項依原付款方式退回；退款細節請見退款政策。

[Source: 超商取貨.md#取件流程與期限]

sources: 超商取貨.md#取件流程與期限

sections.heading: 取消訂單
sections.content:
當訂單狀態為「處理中」（尚未出貨）時，您可於我的訂單自助取消該筆訂單。出貨後即不可取消，請改依退款與退貨流程辦理。

[Source: 訂單管理.md#取消訂單]

sections.heading: 取消訂閱
sections.content:
取消需於下一個帳單週期開始前至少 24 小時完成。已在出貨排程中的該期仍會如期出貨；如需退款，請聯絡客服申請按比例退款。

[Source: 訂閱訂單.md#取消訂閱]

open_questions: 若未在時限內取消，訂閱於何時起生效停止？
按比例退款的計算方式與適用範圍為何？
申請退款需透過哪些客服管道與提供哪些資料？

sections.heading: 取貨時效
sections.content:
付款完成後，商品通常會在門市營業時間內 2 小時內備妥；當訂單狀態顯示「可取貨」即可前往門市取貨。狀態更新前請勿到店，門市無法提前調貨或提早交付商品。

[Source: 門市自取.md#取貨時效]

open_questions: 若於非營業時間完成付款，備貨起算時間為何時？
是否有特例（如預購、缺貨）可能超過 2 小時時效？

sections.heading: 取貨需知
sections.content:
取貨時須出示訂單條碼與身分證件。如委託他人代領，代領人需出示訂單條碼及其本人的身分證件。

[Source: 門市自取.md#取貨需知]

open_questions: 可接受的身分證件種類為何？
是否可出示電子條碼／螢幕截圖，或需紙本？
代領是否需額外授權書或其他證明？
是否有取貨期限或特定時段限制？

sections.heading: 商品保固
sections.content:
本節概述商品保固資訊，包含保固期限、申請方式與不保固範圍。內容聚焦於保固的時效、申請的步驟，以及哪些情形不適用保固。

[Source: 商品保固.md#商品保固]

open_questions: 具體的保固期限為何？
申請保固需提供哪些資料、經哪些步驟？
不保固範圍包含哪些具體情形？

sections.heading: 商品限制
sections.content:
單件商品若重量超過5公斤，或任一邊長超過45公分（材積過大），即不適用超商取貨。系統會於結帳頁面自動隱藏該取貨選項。

[Source: 超商取貨.md#商品限制]

open_questions: 邊長與重量的判定是否含外包裝？
若單一商品符合限制但整筆訂單多件合併是否另有限制？
是否存在例外或人工覆核機制？

sections.id: 回報期限與方式#回報期限與方式
sections.heading: 回報期限與方式
sections.content:
收到損壞或瑕疵商品時，請於48小時內透過「我的訂單 → 回報問題」上傳商品與外包裝照片。照片需清楚顯示損壞部位，將作為審核與後續處理的依據。

[Source: 損壞商品.md#回報期限與方式]

open_questions: 逾48小時是否仍可受理回報？
審核通過後的後續處理方式為何（更換、退款或其他）？
是否需要提供其他佐證資料（如開箱影片）？
sources: 損壞商品.md#回報期限與方式

sections.heading: 回覆時效
sections.content:
本頁說明聯絡客服的回覆時效：Email 來信將於 1 個工作天內回覆。線上客服於服務時間內即時回應；非服務時間送出的訊息視為離線留言，將排入佇列，並於下一個服務時段依序處理。

[Source: 聯絡客服.md#回覆時效]

open_questions: 服務時間的具體時段與適用時區為何？
「1 個工作天」是否排除週末與國定假日，如何計算？

sections.heading: 國際配送
sections.content:
本節概述 ACME 商店 的國際配送地區、配送時效、運費與適用限制，作為您下單前的重要參考。內容旨在協助您理解可配送的目的地、預估到貨時間與相關費用，以及下單時需留意的限制事項。

[Source: 國際配送.md#國際配送]

open_questions: 涵蓋哪些具體國家與地區？
配送時效的計算方式與範圍為何？
運費如何計算或分級？
限制內容包含哪些（例如禁運品、尺寸與重量上限）？

sections.heading: 客服管道
sections.content:
提供三種聯絡客服管道：線上客服（官網右下角聊天視窗）、Email（support@acme-shop.example）、客服電話（02-1234-5678）。三者皆直達客服團隊，您可依個人偏好選擇任一方式與我們聯繫。

[Source: 聯絡客服.md#客服管道]

open_questions: 各管道的服務時間與回覆時效為何？

sections.heading: 密碼規則
sections.content:
密碼需至少 10 碼長度，且必須同時包含大寫字母、小寫字母與數字。上述條件需同時滿足方構成有效密碼。

[Source: 帳號管理與安全.md#密碼規則]

open_questions: 是否需要包含特殊符號？
是否有禁止使用的常見弱密碼或連續／重複字元規則？
是否有密碼有效期限或重複使用限制？
是否要求與舊密碼的最小差異度？
sources: 帳號管理與安全.md#密碼規則

sections.heading: 帳號刪除
sections.content:
在「帳號設定」提交刪除申請後，系統會提供 14 天的猶豫期；期滿後帳號將被永久刪除且無法復原。於猶豫期內，只要重新登入即可自動取消刪除申請。

[Source: 帳號管理與安全.md#帳號刪除]

open_questions: 猶豫期內帳號功能是否會被限制？
是否會在猶豫期內發送提醒通知？
帳號永久刪除時，是否包含所有關聯資料的同步刪除？
sources: 帳號管理與安全.md#帳號刪除

sections.id: 帳號管理與安全#帳號管理與安全
sections.heading: 帳號管理與安全
sections.content:
本文件概述 ACME 商店 帳號的註冊、密碼管理、安全設定與帳號刪除流程。提供相關作業的指引與流程說明，協助使用者完成帳號建立、維護與移除。

[Source: 帳號管理與安全.md#帳號管理與安全]

open_questions: 具體的註冊、密碼管理、安全設定與刪除的步驟與要求為何？
是否還包含其他帳號安全或恢復相關主題？
sources: 帳號管理與安全.md#帳號管理與安全

sections.heading: 快速到貨
sections.content:
本島地區可選用快速到貨，出貨後 1–2 個工作天送達，運費為新台幣 150 元；需於當日 14:00 前完成下單與付款。大型或易碎商品不適用快速到貨，結帳頁面會自動顯示該商品是否支援。

[Source: 運送與配送.md#快速到貨]

open_questions: 「本島地區」的範圍定義為何，是否包含特定離島或偏遠地區？
「工作天」是否排除週末與國定假日？
14:00 的截單時間是否以台灣時間計算？
如何判定「大型」或「易碎」商品的標準？

sections.id: 快閃特賣購物須知#快閃特賣購物須知
sections.heading: 快閃特賣購物須知
sections.content:
快閃特賣活動的購物規則與一般訂單相同：每筆訂單僅能使用一組促銷代碼，且該代碼不適用於已在特價中的商品。標準配送單筆滿 NT$1,000 享免運；由於屬於大型促銷檔期，快閃特賣活動期間的出貨可能比平常延後 1–2 天。

[Source: 快閃特賣.md#快閃特賣購物須知]

open_questions: 「已在特價中的商品」的範圍如何界定（是否僅限標示折扣之商品）？
免運是否僅適用於標準配送，其他配送方式是否另計？
出貨延後 1–2 天是否適用於所有品項與配送地區？
sources: 快閃特賣.md#快閃特賣購物須知

sections.heading: 排除品項
sections.content:
液體與電池類商品不提供國際配送。為避免被誤選，結帳時若購物車含此類商品，系統會自動排除國際配送選項。

[Source: 國際配送.md#排除品項]

open_questions: 「電池類」的範圍是否包含內建電池的商品？

sections.heading: 推薦好友
sections.content:
好友必須透過你的推薦連結註冊並完成首購，你作為推薦人即可獲得 50 點紅利點數獎勵。僅在上述條件皆達成時才計入獎勵。

[Source: 會員與紅利點數.md#推薦好友]

open_questions: 受薦人是否也可獲得獎勵？
獎勵何時入點與是否有有效期限？
是否有推薦次數或累積點數上限？
首購是否有金額或品類限制？
sources: 會員與紅利點數.md#推薦好友

sections.heading: 換貨時效
sections.content:
選擇換貨者，新品將於審核通過後 3 個工作天內寄出。時效以出貨時間為準，非實際送達時間。

[Source: 損壞商品.md#換貨時效]

open_questions: 審核作業需時多久未說明。
「工作天」是否排除國定假日與週末未明確。
寄出後的物流方式與預估送達時間未提供。

sections.heading: 損壞商品
sections.content:
本頁說明對損壞與瑕疵商品的界定範圍與判定原則，並整理相關作業流程。內容包含回報期限與回報方式、後續的處理選項，以及換貨時效。

[Source: 損壞商品.md#損壞商品]

open_questions: 何謂「損壞」與「瑕疵」的具體判定標準為何？
回報期限的具體天數與可接受的回報管道為何？
可提供的處理選項包含哪些情境與限制？
換貨時效的起算點與時程長度為何？

sections.id: 搭配貨到付款#搭配貨到付款
sections.heading: 搭配貨到付款
sections.content:
超商取貨可搭配貨到付款，目前僅限本島地區適用。單筆金額上限與手續費標準請參考付款方式。

[Source: 超商取貨.md#搭配貨到付款]

open_questions: 「本島」指稱的範圍為何（是否包含離島）？
單筆上限與手續費的具體金額與計算方式為何？
sources: 超商取貨.md#搭配貨到付款

sections.heading: 暫停訂閱
sections.content:
訂閱可申請暫停，最長 3 個月。必須在下一個帳單週期開始前至少 24 小時完成暫停，否則該期仍會照常扣款。

[Source: 訂閱訂單.md#暫停訂閱]

open_questions: 暫停可否分段累積至 3 個月，或僅能一次性連續暫停？
暫停期間的服務存取與權益是否保留？
暫停結束後是否自動恢復計費，恢復日如何計算？

sections.id: 會員日優惠-2#會員日優惠
sections.heading: 會員日優惠
sections.content:
於會員日活動期間，紅利點數折抵規則與平日相同：1 點可折抵 NT$1。單筆訂單可用點數折抵的上限為訂單金額的 50%。

[Source: 會員日活動.md#會員日優惠]

open_questions: 「訂單金額」是否包含運費、稅費或加價購項目？
點數折抵與其他優惠（如折價券、滿額折扣）是否可同時使用，及其優先順序為何？
折抵時點數是否支援小數點，進位或捨去規則為何？
折抵後的金額是否影響點數回饋計算基礎？
sources: 會員日活動.md#會員日優惠

sections.id: 會員日優惠#會員日優惠
sections.heading: 會員日優惠
sections.content:
每月會員日活動當天，金卡與白金會員可享點數加碼。惟點數累積規則不變：依實際付款金額計算，每消費 NT$100 得 1 點。

[Source: 會員日活動.md#會員日優惠]

open_questions: 點數加碼的幅度與適用條件未說明。
sources: 會員日活動.md#會員日優惠

sections.heading: 會員等級
sections.content:
本段說明會員等級分為一般會員、金卡會員、白金會員，註冊即為一般會員並享有基本紅利點數回饋。金卡會員資格為近 12 個月消費滿新台幣 30,000 元，權益包含免運不限金額與生日當月雙倍點數。白金會員資格為近 12 個月消費滿新台幣 100,000 元，除享有金卡全部權益外，另提供免費升級快速到貨與專屬客服線。

[Source: 會員與紅利點數.md#會員等級]

open_questions: 「基本點數回饋」的比率與計算規則為何？
等級評定是否為滾動制，升降級生效時間與維持期限為何？
免運是否含偏遠地區或特殊品項的運費？
生日當月雙倍點數是否有上限或排除品項？
快速到貨的適用地區、時效與限制為何？
sources: 會員與紅利點數.md#會員等級

sections.id: 會員與紅利點數#會員與紅利點數
sections.heading: 會員與紅利點數
sections.content:
本文件概述紅利點數的累積方式、折抵機制與效期管理，及其相關規範。亦說明會員等級制度之結構與運作範圍。

[Source: 會員與紅利點數.md#會員與紅利點數]

open_questions: 紅利點數的累積比例與適用範圍為何？
點數折抵的使用規則、門檻與上限為何？
點數效期如何計算，是否可展延或恢復？
會員等級的門檻、升降級條件與週期為何？
各會員等級對應的權益與限制為何？
sources: 會員與紅利點數.md#會員與紅利點數

sections.heading: 服務時間
sections.content:
客服服務時段如下：電話與 Email 客服為週一至週五 09:00–18:00；線上客服於平日時段提供，並另於週六 10:00–17:00 開放。國定假日不提供客服服務。

[Source: 聯絡客服.md#服務時間]

open_questions: 所述時間適用的時區為何？
「國定假日」係指哪一國／地區的法定假日？
線上客服於平日的服務時段是否與電話與 Email 相同（09:00–18:00）？

sections.heading: 標準配送
sections.content:
標準配送出貨後，台灣本島約 3 至 5 個工作天送達；離島地區（澎湖、金門、馬祖）則需額外 1 至 3 個工作天。標準配送運費為新台幣 80 元；單筆訂單滿新台幣 1,000 元享免運（免運門檻）。

[Source: 運送與配送.md#標準配送]

open_questions: 離島地區的實際到貨時間是否為本島 3–5 個工作天再加計 1–3 個工作天？

sections.heading: 登入保護
sections.content:
連續 5 次登入失敗將觸發 帳號鎖定，鎖定時長為 30 分鐘。鎖定期間，可透過 忘記密碼 流程進行 密碼重設，以提前解除鎖定。

[Source: 帳號管理與安全.md#登入保護]

open_questions: 「5 次」是否指在特定時間窗內的連續失敗？
鎖定是否跨裝置與登入渠道一致生效？
管理員是否可人工提前解除鎖定？
完成密碼重設後，失敗計數是否立即清零？
sources: 帳號管理與安全.md#登入保護

sections.heading: 禮物卡
sections.content:
本文件說明電子禮物卡的面額、效期與使用規則，界定了可選金額、有效期間與可用方式。讀者可據此了解卡片價值選項、到期相關規範，以及使用時需遵循的規則。

[Source: 禮物卡.md#禮物卡]

open_questions: 具體面額有哪些？
效期如何起算與到期規則為何？
使用規則涵蓋哪些限制或例外？

sections.heading: 聯絡客服
sections.content:
本文件說明 ACME 商店的客服管道、服務時間與回覆時效。重點在指引客戶如何聯絡客服、何時可獲得服務，以及預期的回覆時間。

[Source: 聯絡客服.md#聯絡客服]

open_questions: 具體提供哪些客服管道？
實際的服務時間為何？
各管道的標準回覆時效是多少？

sections.heading: 自取地點
sections.content:
台北信義、台中西屯與高雄夢時代三家門市皆提供自取服務，屬於門市自取的一部分。選擇自取可享免運費。

[Source: 門市自取.md#自取地點]

open_questions: 是否僅限這三家門市提供自取？
是否需先完成線上預購或通知才可自取？
自取的取貨時段與有效期限為何？

sections.id: 與一般退貨的差異#與一般退貨的差異
sections.heading: 與一般退貨的差異
sections.content:
損壞/瑕疵商品的退貨不受「未使用、包裝完整」等一般退貨條件限制，且其退貨運費由 ACME 商店負擔。詳細規範與流程請參考退款與退貨。

[Source: 損壞商品.md#與一般退貨的差異]

open_questions: 是否需提供損壞/瑕疵之證明或照片？
退貨受理的時限為何？
是否支援換貨或僅能退款？
退回方式與指定物流為何？
sources: 損壞商品.md#與一般退貨的差異

sections.id: 與紅利點數的關係#與紅利點數的關係
sections.heading: 與紅利點數的關係
sections.content:
關於禮物卡與紅利點數的關係如下。購買禮物卡的訂單不會累積紅利點數。使用禮物卡付款的訂單則照常累積點數。

[Source: 禮物卡.md#與紅利點數的關係]

sources: 禮物卡.md#與紅利點數的關係

sections.heading: 處理選項
sections.content:
損壞商品經審核成立後，消費者可於兩種處理方式擇一。可選免費換貨：同品項換新且來回運費由 ACME 商店負擔；或選全額退款：包含原訂單運費，並退回原付款方式。

[Source: 損壞商品.md#處理選項]

open_questions: 若同品項缺貨時是否有替代方案？
退款與換貨的處理時程為何？
是否有申請期限或資格限制？

sections.heading: 行動支付
sections.content:
本頁說明行動支付的支援情況。目前支援 apple-pay 與 google-pay。

[Source: 付款方式.md#行動支付]

open_questions: 是否也支援其他行動支付（如 Samsung Pay 等）？
支援適用於哪些通路（線上／門市）與地區？
是否有裝置或版本的相容性限制？
是否有金額上限或驗證要求？

sections.id: 訂單查詢與發票#訂單查詢與發票
sections.heading: 訂單查詢與發票
sections.content:
系統保留訂單紀錄 5 年。使用者可於「我的訂單」查詢歷史訂單並下載電子發票。

[Source: 訂單管理.md#訂單查詢與發票]

open_questions: 5 年的起算點為何（下單日、出貨日或完成日）？
逾 5 年的訂單是否會被刪除或無法申請調閱？
電子發票的檔案格式與下載限制為何？
sources: 訂單管理.md#訂單查詢與發票

sections.heading: 訂單管理
sections.content:
本節概述訂單管理範疇，說明訂單取消、訂單修改與訂單查詢的相關規則。內容旨在提供處理上述情境的指引，協助一致地應對這些操作需求。

[Source: 訂單管理.md#訂單管理]

open_questions: 具體的取消、修改與查詢規則為何（如可執行的條件、時限、權限）？
是否包含實際處理流程或範例？
覆蓋範圍是否僅限於一般訂單，或含預購／特殊訂單？
是否規範例外情境與爭議處理？

sections.heading: 訂閱優惠
sections.content:
訂閱訂單每期價格為單購價的95折。訂閱訂單免運費，且不受一般免運門檻限制。

[Source: 訂閱訂單.md#訂閱優惠]

open_questions: 95折是否可與其他折扣或優惠碼併用？
折扣計算的四捨五入規則與適用品項為何？
免運是否有地區、重量或配送方式的例外？

sections.heading: 訂閱訂單
sections.content:
本頁概述訂閱制購物規範，作為訂閱訂單的總覽與指引，說明適用品項、優惠、以及暫停與取消的適用範圍與基本要求。其目的在於幫助使用者在進行訂閱制購物前，理解哪些品項與優惠適用，以及暫停或取消時需遵守的基本規範。

[Source: 訂閱訂單.md#訂閱訂單]

open_questions: 適用品項的具體清單為何？
優惠的適用條件與限制為何？
暫停與取消的流程、時效與費用是否有明確規定？
是否有最低期數或其他基本要求？

sections.heading: 註冊方式
sections.content:
支援三種註冊方式：Email、Google 帳號、LINE 帳號。若以第三方帳號註冊，可於「帳號設定」補設密碼，作為備援登入方式。

[Source: 帳號管理與安全.md#註冊方式]

sources: 帳號管理與安全.md#註冊方式

sections.heading: 貨到付款
sections.content:
貨到付款僅限本島之超商取貨訂單適用，不適用其他配送或離島地區。每筆訂單金額上限為新台幣 20,000 元，並需另收手續費新台幣 30 元。超過上限或不符合適用範圍者無法使用此付款方式。

[Source: 付款方式.md#貨到付款]

open_questions: 「本島」的範圍定義為何（是否包含特定離島行政區）？
適用的超商通路是否有品牌或門市限制？

sections.id: 超商代碼繳費#超商代碼繳費
sections.heading: 超商代碼繳費
sections.content:
超商代碼繳費每筆交易上限為新台幣 20,000 元。自下單起 3 天內需完成繳費，逾期未繳費的訂單將自動取消。

[Source: 付款方式.md#超商代碼繳費]

sources: 付款方式.md#超商代碼繳費

sections.heading: 超商取貨
sections.content:
本節為「超商取貨」的總覽，僅界定主題範圍而不展開細節。關於實務操作的具體費率、保留天數與品項限制，請參見後續各節。

[Source: 超商取貨.md#超商取貨]

open_questions: 是否涵蓋不同國家／地區的超商取貨規則差異？
後續各節所述內容的適用對象與生效期間為何？

sections.id: 超商取貨運費#超商取貨運費
sections.heading: 超商取貨運費
sections.content:
超商取貨運費為新台幣 60 元。單筆訂單滿新台幣 1,000 元即免運，免運門檻與宅配相同。

[Source: 超商取貨.md#超商取貨運費]

open_questions: 運費與免運門檻是否為含稅金額？
是否適用所有超商據點與離島地區？
免運門檻計算是否以折扣或折讓後的實付金額為準？
sources: 超商取貨.md#超商取貨運費

sections.heading: 退款條件
sections.content:
本節說明一般退款需符合兩項條件：商品未使用且包裝完整，並隨附原始購買憑證（電子發票或訂單編號）。若因商品瑕疵或運送損壞提出退款申請，則不受上述限制，詳見[[損壞商品]]。

[Source: 退款與退貨.md#退款條件]

open_questions: 是否有申請退款的時間限制？
「包裝完整」的具體標準為何？
一般退貨的運費由誰負擔？

sections.heading: 退款流程
sections.content:
登入帳號後，前往[[我的訂單]]，選擇欲退款的訂單並點擊[[申請退款]]，填寫原因提交申請。客服將於3個工作天內完成審核；審核通過後，款項會在5至7個工作天內退回[[原付款方式]]。

[Source: 退款與退貨.md#退款流程]

open_questions: 是否支援部分退款或多次退款？
若審核未通過是否提供申覆或補件機制？
審核結果與退款進度的通知方式為何？
退款入帳時間是否因發卡銀行或支付管道而異？

sections.id: 退款申請窗口#退款申請窗口
sections.heading: 退款申請窗口
sections.content:
顧客可於收到商品後 14 天內（含例假日）提出退款申請，逾期恕不受理。退款審核與入帳時程請參見下方的「[[退款流程]]」。

[Source: 退款與退貨.md#退款申請窗口]

open_questions: 「收到商品」的起算時間如何認定（例如物流簽收時間、門市取貨時間）？
退款申請需透過哪些管道提出，並需提供哪些資料？
sources: 退款與退貨.md#退款申請窗口

sections.id: 退貨期限提醒#退貨期限提醒
sections.heading: 退貨期限提醒
sections.content:
顧客可於收到商品後30天內提出退款申請；非瑕疵退貨之運費新台幣80元由顧客自付。客服將於3個工作天內完成審核流程，審核通過後，款項將於5–7個工作天退回原付款方式。

[Source: 退貨期限提醒.md#退貨期限提醒]

詳見 [[退貨教學]]。

open_questions: 「收到商品後30天」為曆日或工作日的計算方式未明。
退款是否包含運費與其他手續費未說明。
非瑕疵退貨的判定標準與流程未闡述。
原付款方式為分期或電子錢包時的入帳時程與限制未明。
海外或偏遠地區之退貨運費是否不同未說明。
sources: 退貨期限提醒.md#退貨期限提醒

sections.heading: 退貨運費
sections.content:
非瑕疵退貨由顧客負擔新台幣 80 元退貨運費，將自退款金額中扣除。若為商品瑕疵或運送損壞之退貨，運費由 [[ACME 商店]] 承擔。另，[[ACME 商店]] 所有品類均不收取[[整新費]]（restocking fee）。

[Source: 退款與退貨.md#退貨運費]

open_questions: 非瑕疵退貨之新台幣 80 元為每件商品、每箱包裹，或每筆訂單計收？
海外或偏遠地區退貨是否適用相同運費規則？
「瑕疵／運送損壞」的認定與證明流程為何？

sections.id: 逾期與補發#逾期與補發
sections.heading: 逾期與補發
sections.content:
促銷代碼逾期即失效，效期不予延長且不提供補發。代碼的有效期限以活動頁面公告為準。

[Source: 促銷代碼.md#逾期與補發]

sections.heading: 運費
sections.content:
本段說明國際配送運費：亞洲地區新台幣400元起，北美地區新台幣800元起。實際費用依包裹重量於結帳時計算，且國際訂單不適用免運優惠。

[Source: 國際配送.md#運費]

open_questions: 是否有其他地區的起運費標準？
運費依重量計算的級距或公式為何？

sections.id: 運送與配送#運送與配送
sections.heading: 運送與配送
sections.content:
本節說明 ACME 商店的國內配送方式、運費與到貨時效。若為國際訂單，請見國際配送。

[Source: 運送與配送.md#運送與配送]

sources: 運送與配送.md#運送與配送

sections.id: 適用品項與週期#適用品項與週期
sections.heading: 適用品項與週期
sections.content:
訂閱訂單適用於消耗性商品（如濾芯、清潔用品）。配送配送週期可選 30、60 或 90 天。

[Source: 訂閱訂單.md#適用品項與週期]

open_questions: 週期是否僅限 30/60/90 天，或可自訂／後續變更？
sources: 訂閱訂單.md#適用品項與週期

sections.heading: 配送地區
sections.content:
本節說明國際配送的可配送地區：日本、韓國、香港、澳門、新加坡、馬來西亞、美國、加拿大。除上述地區外，暫不提供國際配送。

[Source: 國際配送.md#配送地區]

sections.heading: 配送查詢
sections.content:
出貨後，系統會寄送含物流單號的通知信，您也可於「我的訂單」頁面點選「查詢物流」追蹤出貨進度。物流資訊將在出貨後 24 小時內更新。

[Source: 運送與配送.md#配送查詢]

sections.heading: 重新啟用
sections.content:
重新啟用已取消的訂閱時，價格與供貨狀況以當時為準。原訂閱價不保留，可能與先前相比有所不同。

[Source: 訂閱訂單.md#重新啟用]

sections.id: 門市據點與自取服務#門市據點與自取服務
sections.heading: 門市據點與自取服務
sections.content:
ACME 商店共有三家實體門市，分別位於台北信義、台中西屯與高雄夢時代。三家門市皆提供線上訂單的門市自取服務，免運費；取貨時需出示訂單條碼與身分證件。

[Source: 門市服務指南.md#門市據點與自取服務]

open_questions: 是否有取貨時限或通知方式？
可否由他人代領及所需證件？
各門市營業時間與取貨櫃台位置？
sources: 門市服務指南.md#門市據點與自取服務

sections.heading: 門市自取
sections.content:
本節概述門市自取的相關資訊，包含可供自取的門市地點、預計取貨時效與重要注意事項，協助顧客規劃到店取貨流程。內容旨在讓顧客了解去哪裡取貨、何時可取，以及取貨時需留意的重點。

[Source: 門市自取.md#門市自取]

open_questions: 具體的門市地點清單為何？
各門市的取貨時效與可取時段為何？
取貨時需攜帶的證明或身分文件為何？
未於時效內取貨的處理方式為何？

sections.id: 關稅與稅費#關稅與稅費
sections.heading: 關稅與稅費
sections.content:
國際訂單採用ddu條件，目的地關稅與進口稅由收件人負擔。通關時，相關稅費將由當地物流業者代收。

[Source: 國際配送.md#關稅與稅費]

open_questions: 是否會產生額外的代收手續費？
收件人若拒付稅費時的處理流程為何？
是否存在國別差異或免稅門檻的適用？
下單前是否提供關稅與稅費的預估方式？

sections.id: 面額與交付#面額與交付
sections.heading: 面額與交付
sections.content:
禮物卡以電子形式提供，面額固定為新台幣 500、1,000、3,000 元。完成付款後，系統會透過 Email 將卡片寄送至指定收件人。

[Source: 禮物卡.md#面額與交付]

open_questions: 是否支援自訂面額或其他幣別？
是否可安排寄送時間，或為付款完成後即時寄出？

sections.heading: 點數折抵
sections.content:
點數折抵規則：結帳時，紅利點數可用於折抵應付金額，折抵比例為 1 點＝新台幣 1 元。單筆訂單折抵上限為訂單金額的 50%。

[Source: 會員與紅利點數.md#點數折抵]

open_questions: 折抵是否涵蓋運費、稅金或僅限商品金額？
是否可與其他優惠或折扣碼併用？
退貨或取消訂單時，已使用的點數如何處理？
sources: 會員與紅利點數.md#點數折抵

sections.heading: 點數效期
sections.content:
點數自入帳日起 12 個月內有效，逾期自動失效。可於「我的點數」查詢點數餘額與到期日。

[Source: 會員與紅利點數.md#點數效期]

sources: 會員與紅利點數.md#點數效期

sections.heading: 點數累積
sections.content:
每消費新台幣 100 元累積 1 點，依「實際付款金額」計算；運費與點數折抵部分不列入累積。點數將於訂單完成（鑑賞期過後）24 小時內入帳。

[Source: 會員與紅利點數.md#點數累積]

open_questions: 「實際付款金額」的計算是否包含稅金與其他折扣？
未滿新台幣 100 元是否採無條件捨去或四捨五入計點？
若訂單部分取消或退貨，入帳點數如何調整？
sources: 會員與紅利點數.md#點數累積

sections.heading: 點數限制
sections.content:
本節說明紅利點數的使用限制：點數不可兌換現金，亦不得轉讓至其他帳號。若發生訂單退款，該筆訂單所使用的點數折抵與因該訂單獲得的紅利點數回饋，將一併由系統收回。

[Source: 會員與紅利點數.md#點數限制]

open_questions: 部分退款時，點數的收回與計算規則為何？
若收回時會員點數餘額不足，是否產生負點數或以其他方式處理？
點數轉讓是否在特定情境（如家庭帳號）有例外？
點數收回的時間點與通知方式為何？
sources: 會員與紅利點數.md#點數限制

sections.heading: how-long-do-refunds-take-for-a-request-t-6d6071
sections.content: Refund requests are reviewed within 3 business days, and if approved, the money reaches the original payment method within 5–7 business days [Source: return-deadline-reminder#return-deadline-reminder].

sections.heading: qa-store-services-en-004
sections.content: <!-- Generated by POST /chat filing - manual edits may be overwritten on promotion. -->

sections.heading: Which stores offer in-store pickup?
sections.content: All three ACME stores - Taipei Xinyi, Taichung Xitun, and Kaohsiung Dream Mall - offer free in-store pickup for online orders.

sections.heading: what-payment-methods-are-accepted-for-pa-fdc2ef
sections.content: We accept the following payment methods: VISA, MasterCard, and JCB credit cards, paid as a single charge or in installments for qualifying orders [Source: credit-cards#credit-cards]; convenience store payment codes, with a NT$20,000 per-order limit and payment due within 3 days of placing the order [Source: convenience-store-payment-codes#convenience-store-payment-codes]; mobile payments via Apple Pay and Google Pay [Source: mobile-payments#mobile-payments]; and cash on delivery, available when combined with convenience store pickup on the main island only [Source: cash-on-delivery#cash-on-delivery]. Bank transfers, checks, and foreign-currency payments are not accepted [Source: not-accepted#not-accepted].

metadata.question: What payment methods are accepted for payments?

sections.heading: which-countries-does-acme-shop-ship-to-f70fda
sections.content: ACME Shop currently ships to Japan, South Korea, Hong Kong, Macau, Singapore, Malaysia, the United States, and Canada [Source: destinations#destinations].

metadata.question: Which countries does ACME Shop ship to?

sections.id: 你們接受哪些付款方式-fb0f2e
sections.file: 你們接受哪些付款方式-fb0f2e
sections.heading: 你們接受哪些付款方式-fb0f2e
heading_path: 你們接受哪些付款方式-fb0f2e
sections.content: ACME 商店接受的付款方式包括 VISA、MasterCard 和 JCB 的信用卡付款，並且可一次付清或在符合滿額門檻的情況下選擇分期付款[Source: 信用卡#信用卡]。不支援的付款方式包括銀行轉帳、支票與外幣付款[Source: 不支援的付款方式#不支援的付款方式]。
